ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the component */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the component */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor supplying the component */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the component */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time in days for delivery */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "last_purchase_price" REAL /* Price of the last purchase */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Specific point at which reordering should occur */,
  "safety_stock" INTEGER /* Safety stock level to prevent stockouts */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the component in days */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the vendor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time in days for delivery */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed */,
  "last_order_amount" REAL /* Amount of the last order */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Vendor rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, employee) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user owning the cart entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component being added to the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in the cart */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the cart */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the purchase */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated order */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the purchase */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory log entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component affected */,
  "change_amount" INTEGER /* Change in stock amount (positive or negative) */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., addition, subtraction) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time in days for delivery */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed */,
  "last_order_amount" REAL /* Amount of the last order */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Supplier rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for shipping */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being paid for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Resistors, Capacitors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category for hierarchical categorization */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component associated with the threshold */,
  "min_stock" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level before reordering */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock reaches the minimum level */,
  "reorder_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reordering (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "reorder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reorder (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_thresholds_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
